query: /namer name a CLI tool for database migrations
expected_behavior: Agent runs memory.py load before Phase 0 Brief
If memory has archetype affinities, Phase 1 biases generation toward preferred archetypes
If memory has phonetic dislikes, Phase 1 hard filters exclude those sounds
If memory has weight overrides, Phase 3 scoring uses stored splits
If memory has context defaults, Phase 0 suggests prior context to user
After user selects a name, agent runs memory.py save-selection
When user cites inspirations, agent runs memory.py save-inspiration
Memory saves happen AFTER primary output, never blocking a phase
If no memory exists, agent proceeds normally without error
